_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: Staining of tumor sections from mice injected IV with AAV-K55-GFP demonstrated a strong transduction of GFP, in comparison to the AAV9-GFP as a benchmark
details: Successfully detected GFP transduction in immunohistochemistry of tumor sections, showing improved transduction by K55-GFP compared to AAV9-GFP
